name: Dorchester Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the chopped chocolate in a bowl with the marshmallow topping, walnuts, butter, and vanilla extract. Set aside.
2. In a 2-quart saucepan, combine the sugar and evaporated milk. Cook over medium heat until the mixture reaches a full rolling boil for 5 minutes, stirring constantly.
3. Carefully pour the boiling sugar-milk mixture over the chocolate mixture and stir until the chocolate is melted. Pour into a buttered 8-inch square pan. Chill until firm, about one hour. Cut into squares. Makes 1 1/2 lbs. 3 dozen pieces.
Mocha Almond Fudge:
Prepare Dorchester Fudge as directed; using chopped, toasted almonds for the walnuts and adding 2 teaspoons instant coffee powder to the sugar-milk mixture.
